name: Bayou Lacombe Crab Balls
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix crabmeat, eggs and bread crumbs.
2. Form into small balls the size of small meatballs.
3. Roll each ball in flour.
4. Fry in peanut oil until golden brown.
5. Drain on paper towels.
6. Insert toothpicks into crab balls.
7. Serve with tartar sauce or ketchup.
Recipe attributed to New Orleans Recipes, featured at the Bayou Lacombe Crab Festival in Late-June 1995.
